evals.prompt: Write browser tests for this UserList component that fetches and displays team members. The component is at evals/files/UserList.tsx.
evals.expected_output: A test file using Vitest browser mode with MSW handlers, page object, fixtures, factory functions, and role-based locators
expectations: Locates elements by role within scoped UI regions, not CSS selectors or data-testid
Uses browserWorker.use() for per-test API handlers
Page object uses Object.assign(page, self) pattern
Page object methods follow get*/expect*/action naming convention
Uses the Vitest builder pattern (.extend('name', ...)) or test.extend for typed fixtures
Test names describe observable user behavior, not implementation details
Uses a factory function (e.g. createUser()) with overridable defaults for test data
Happy-path MSW handlers are defined in a shared handlers module, not inlined in every test

evals.prompt: This TaskBoard component needs tests — it has filtering by priority and three status columns (todo, in-progress, done). The component is at evals/files/TaskBoard.tsx.
evals.expected_output: A test file with scoped locators for different columns, page object with scoped locators, and fixture composition
expectations: Locators chain through parent regions to scope queries within different columns
Suggests markup improvements where needed to make elements queryable by role
Page object uses self-referencing scoped locators (self.getColumn() pattern)
Fixtures compose through the extension chain (e.g. page object fixture depends on render fixture)

evals.prompt: I need to add tests for this ContactForm — it validates inputs client-side and submits to /api/contacts. The component is at evals/files/ContactForm.tsx.
evals.expected_output: A test file with MSW custom resolvers matching request body, per-test overrides for error scenarios, form role locators, and behavior-focused test names
expectations: Uses a custom higher-order resolver (e.g. withJsonBody) for POST request body matching
Uses browserWorker.use() to override handlers for error scenarios
Uses role-based locators for form elements (textbox, button roles)
Test names describe validation and submission behaviors, not implementation details

evals.prompt: Write tests for this NotificationPanel — it shows a list of notifications with read/unread status, has a bell icon with a badge count, and auto-scrolls to new notifications. The component is at evals/files/NotificationPanel.tsx.
evals.expected_output: A test file that uses data-testid only for the scroll container state, locates notifications by role, and uses factory functions for notification data
expectations: Uses data-testid only for the scroll container's non-visible state (not for locating regular UI elements)
Locates notification items by role and accessible name, not CSS selectors
Uses a factory function (e.g. createNotification()) with overridable defaults for test data

evals.prompt: Write tests for this Dashboard component. It has a sidebar with navigation and a main content panel — both contain lists and headings that could clash. I want separate fixture files for the sidebar and main content areas. The component is at evals/files/Dashboard.tsx.
evals.expected_output: Multiple files: separate fixture files per feature area, page objects with scoped locators for sidebar vs main content
expectations: Creates separate fixture files for sidebar and main content that extend from a shared base or independently render
Sidebar page object scopes locators within the sidebar region
Main content page object scopes locators within the main content region
Locators chain through parent regions to avoid cross-region clashes between lists/headings

evals.prompt: I need to set up vitest for this React project. We need browser tests using Playwright and unit tests that run in Node. Can you set up the vitest config, the browser test setup file with MSW, and show me where test files should go? The project scaffold is at evals/files/project-scaffold/.
evals.expected_output: A vitest config with dual projects (unit + browser), a browser setup file with MSW worker start/reset/stop, and guidance on test file colocation
expectations: Vitest config has two projects: unit (Node, *.test.ts) and browser (Playwright, *.test.tsx)
Browser setup file starts MSW worker with onUnhandledRequest: "error"
Setup file has resetHandlers() in afterEach and stop() in afterAll
Test files are colocated with source files, not in a separate __tests__ directory
